text.title: Product Hunt Launch System Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: PH-fit audience AND ≥4 weeks runway AND not launched before?

branch.when: audience_fit == 'ph' AND prep_weeks >= 4 AND prior_launch == false
